message:
test(session-types): add comprehensive integration tests for obligation protocols (bd-3u5d3.6)

52 tests covering all three session-typed obligation protocols:
- SendPermit/Ack: commit/abort paths, value type polymorphism, channel ID preservation
- Lease/Release: acquire/release, renewals (0-10), immediate release
- Reserve/Commit: all obligation kinds, abort reasons, ReserveMsg kind preservation
- Drop bomb: 4 should_panic tests verify leaked sessions panic
- Delegation: type structure compilation, channel pair creation
- Concurrency: 100 SendPermit, 50 Lease, 30 Two-Phase concurrent sessions
- Protocol composition: nested two-phase within lease, interleaved protocols
- Determinism: 100-run replay consistency for SendPermit and Two-Phase
- Property tests: 7 proptest suites with random channel IDs, renewals, kinds
- E2E LabRuntime: async session endpoints with send/recv, choose/offer, 10 concurrent
- Backward compat: obligation kind matching, module alias verification
- Duality: compile-time dual type verification
- Edge cases: channel_id=0, channel_id=MAX, message field preservation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
